Cbf Networks, Inc. Dba Fastback Networks Notice Of Motion, Motion And Memorandum In Support Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Cog1, Inc. **Filed On Demand**
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Nelson of Nelson Law Group telephone number 415-702-9869 for Plaintiff.
Charles Koch of Pepper Hamilton LLP telephone number 650-802-3604 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT CBF NETWORKS, INC. D/B/A FASTBACK NETWORKS' Motion And Memorandum In Support Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Cog1, Inc. is granted. Sanctions are denied. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Shapiro. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
